// ==/UserScript==

[data-domain*="psbios.co.uk"],
[data-domain*="mp4moviez.co.uk"],

[data-domain*="eruditemeetup.co.uk"],
[data-domain*="organizeblogs.com"],
[data-domain*="really-haunted.com"],

[data-domain*="mmsbee.co.uk"],
[data-domain*="celebvogue.com"],
[data-domain*="www.otsnews.co.uk"],
[data-domain*="newspatrolling.com"],
[data-domain*="theukpost.co.uk"],
[data-domain*="www.parmapress24.it"],
[data-domain*="northiowatoday.com"],
[data-domain*="pmldaily.com"],
[data-domain*="canadacrimeindex.com"],
[data-domain*="prophecynewswatch.com"],
[data-domain*="www.indiainputs.com"],
[data-domain*="muddyrivernews.com"],
[data-domain*="aajkitajikhabar.com"],
[data-domain*="tasmaniantimes.com"],
[data-domain*="hudsonweekly.com"],
[data-domain*="www.hometownstation.com"],
[data-domain*="newswatchtv.com"],
[data-domain*="businesspost.ng"],
[data-domain*="www.colombotelegraph.com"],
[data-domain*="www.theclintoncourier.net"],
[data-domain*="www.takeonedigitalnetwork.com"],
[data-domain*="savedelete.com"],
[data-domain*="dailynewshungary.com"],
[data-domain*="kahawatungu.com"],
[data-domain*="www.fontmirror.com"],
[data-domain*="www.readability.com"],
[data-domain*="adventuregamers.com"],
[data-domain*="escapistmagazine.com"],
[data-domain*="www.gameshub.com"],
[data-domain*="revenuepass.com"],
[data-domain*="videogamer.com"],
[data-domain*="dcinl.com"],
[data-domain*="definicionwiki.com"],
#__non-existent__{display: none}`;
    if (document.location.hostname.includes('google')) {
        const domains = css
            .split('\n')
            .map(
                (s) => s.slice(15).replace('"],', '').trim(),
            )
            .filter(Boolean);
        // Remove {display:none}
        domains.splice(domains.length - 1, 1);
        for (const domain of domains) {
            try {
                const p = document
                    .querySelector(`#search a[href*="${domain}"]`)
                    .parentNode.parentNode.parentNode.parentNode;
                if (p) {
                    p.parentNode.removeChild(p);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                // Ignore
            }
        }
    } else {
        const style = document.createElement('style');
        style.textContent = css;
        document.head.insertAdjacentElement('beforeend', style);
    }
})();
